narrative_text: A curious little octopus named Pip has just found a shimmering, golden treasure chest tucked behind a wall of waving purple kelp. What do you think Pip will find inside when the lid finally creaks open?
branch_summary: An adventurous octopus discovers a glowing treasure chest in a vibrant coral reef.
scene_description: A sun-drenched tropical coral reef at midday, where beams of light pierce through the turquoise water to illuminate the sandy floor. The atmosphere is peaceful and magical, featuring a palette of neon pinks, deep purples, and shimmering gold. The composition focuses on a central sandy clearing framed by towering kelp and jagged coral rock.

properties.color: bright coral-orange with tiny iridescent blue rings
properties.size: medium, about the size of a soccer ball
properties.texture: smooth and slightly slimy with suction cups visible on the underside of arms
properties.distinctive_features: large, expressive amber eyes and one tentacle wearing a tiny silver bracelet

entities.pose: hovering mid-water with two tentacles reaching out tentatively toward the chest, others curled playfully

properties.color: weathered oak brown with gleaming gold trim
properties.texture: rough, grainy wood with polished metallic edges
properties.pattern: scrolled engravings of sea waves on the golden bands
properties.distinctive_features: a large, skull-shaped keyhole that emits a soft, pulsing yellow glow

entities.pose: sitting partially tilted in the sand, lid slightly ajar with light leaking out

properties.color: deep royal purple with magenta edges
properties.size: large, reaching from the floor to the top of the frame
properties.pattern: ribbed veins running vertically up each leaf
properties.distinctive_features: tiny air bubbles clinging to the leaves like pearls

entities.pose: swaying gently to the left as if moved by an underwater current

error_exclusions.reason: There is only one octopus character in this scene.
The chest is a static environmental object.
